summary: Shipping Tracking Module P1 Features Testing Complete. All features verified working. Backend APIs (10/10 tests passed). Admin shipping modal working. Customer order history with shipping details working. Reseller 'Shipped' tab added and verified - resellers can now view shipping details with Track Package link opening in new tab.

minor.issue: Returns 422 instead of 401 when auth header missing - functional but non-standard HTTP behavior

issues: React hydration warnings: <tr> inside <span> causing invalid HTML nesting - cosmetic only

critical_code_review_comments: Added 'Shipped' tab to WIPOrdersPage.jsx (line 689-693) to allow resellers to view shipped orders
All shipping tracking features now fully functional across admin and reseller views
seed_data_creation: Added shipping details to orders 'testy -- 507052' and 'testy -- 789132' via backend test (courier: FedEx Express, AWB: TEST123456789)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shipping tracking module fully implemented and tested. Admin can add shipping via modal, status changes to shipped, icon turns green. Customer management shows order history with shipping details. Reseller 'Shipped' tab added - resellers can view shipping info with Track Package link. All P1 features verified working.

admin_shipping_modal.details: Shipping Details modal opens from truck icon. All fields present: Courier, AWB, Shipped Date, Expected Delivery, Tracking URL, Notes. Save works correctly.

order_status_change_on_ship.details: Order status changes to 'shipped' after saving shipping details via API

shipping_icon_color.details: Truck icon turns green (text-green-600) for orders with shipping details, orange for orders without

customer_order_history.details: Admin can view customer order history via Customer Management. Shipped orders show 'Shipped' badge and shipping details section with courier, AWB, dates, Track Package link

reseller_view_shipping.details: Added 'Shipped' tab to WIPOrdersPage.jsx. Resellers can now view shipped orders and see full shipping details including Courier, AWB, Shipped Date, Expected Delivery, Track Package link, and Shipping Notes.

tracking_url_new_tab.details: Track Package link has target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'. Verified via Playwright - href returns actual tracking URL (https://www.fedex.com/fedextrack?trknbr=TEST123456789)

api_verification.GET /api/orders/admin/all: PASS - Returns all orders with shipping_details embedded
api_verification.POST /api/pricing/shipping-tracking: PASS - Adds shipping details and changes status to shipped
api_verification.GET /api/admin/customers: PASS - Returns customers with order counts
api_verification.GET /api/admin/customers/{customer_id}: PASS - Returns customer details with orders including shipping_details
